Take a look at the transformation with custom UFabrik banners and flags!

description: Riverview High School witnessed a remarkable transformation. The once ordinary and empty space is now a vibrant showcase of the Rams’ spirit. Thanks to UFabrik and LexJet, the revitalized stadium has become a true reflection of the school's spirit, instilling a sense of pride in students, faculty, and the entire community. The new banners and flags have given the high school the look of a professional-grade stadium, with banners wrapping around the field in every direction.

Mactac Printvinyl™ Scored is a film recognized for its proven quality and consistent printability. The new precision-scored liner, with a 1.25" spacing, guarantees a seamless and hassle-free removal process for decals, industrial labels, bumper stickers, and more.

Some of UFabrik’s materials are eco-friendly, some of which are made from recycled single-use plastic waste, while others are polyester-based, allowing for recycling or waste-to-energy conversion.

This groundbreaking printer introduces unique add-on features, such as the Wrinkle Analyzer, which detects and stops the printer for you to address any wrinkles, a backlit light that provides visibility of the printing job in progress, slitters, a super duty winder capable of handling media weighing up to approximately 1,750 pounds, and numerous other innovative capabilities!

title: Transform Your Environment with Easy Wallcoverings Printed with the EFI™ Pro 32r+

The efficient LED curing technology ensures exceptional durability for your wallcoverings during installation and cleaning. Your prints emerge from the printer fully prepared for installation, eliminating the need for additional finishing. Additionally, the low heat output prevents substrate warping and melting. If you require printing on larger rolls, the optional super duty winder can accommodate media weighing up to approximately 1,750 pounds. This printer is also Type II certified without lamination.

title: EFI™ Pro 32r+ Roll-to-Roll LED Printer
description: Discover the EFI™ Pro 32r+, the roll-to-roll printer engineered for your needs and designed for your wants. Benefit from cool LED curing technology that reduces power consumption and minimizes environmental impact. Say goodbye to substrate warping and melting, thanks to the low heat output. With an impressive lamp life of up to 20,000 hours, expect greater productivity, reduced downtime, and an extended lifespan for your printer.

Your project determines how your printer is configured with the ink configuration that works for you — white ink, clear ink, etc. Mimaki also aligns with your sustainability goals with UL GREENGUARD Gold Certified inks.

title: Protect What You Create with Marabu Clearshield
description:
Whether creating a family heirloom canvas wrap or a banner to celebrate a milestone birthday, Marabu has a liquid coating for you.

Marabu ClearShield Select is perfect for manual or automated applications and provides chemical and scratch resistance on rigid substrates, canvas, vinyl, and banners. It is available in gloss, semi-gloss or matte finishes.

Own a StarLam? Marabu Clearshield Select for StarLam is your laminate of choice. It’s the same Clearshield formula, but with lower viscosity, so it works perfectly with roll-to-roll laminators like the StarLam 1600R.

If you have corporate clients who need heavy-duty protection, Marabu has you covered. For the most demanding applications like truck tarps, tents, or inflatables, choose Marabu Clearshield Professional Transit.

The entire Marabu line of protective coatings offers you and your clients peace of mind, knowing that their images and artwork are safe for years to come.

title: Sunset Image Awards 2021 - Sunset Awards
description:
As the summer was winding down, LexJet held the Sunset Image Awards, an online photo contest to help all levels of photographers learn from Cheri and Dennis Hammon, and Pete Wright.  Dennis is a PPA affiliate juror and Cheri is a qualified juror for state competitions. Pete Write is a professional photographer, a PPA juror, and a Canon Technical Specialist.

After each image was shown, the judges analyzed it and then offered their critiques and insights for the top images. While judging is subjective, the ratings are based on PPA’s 12 Elements of Merit.

Over 50 images were chosen to go to the final judging, where each image was scored. When a judge felt it was necessary, he or she challenged the scores and they discussed, in detail, why they scored the way they did. 

After the discussion, jury chairperson Dennis Hammon would ask all the judges to score again. If you’ve never entered a photo competition, this was a great opportunity to see and hear how the judging happens.

In this video, you can watch the judges’ announcement of the top image in each category:

·         Fine Art/Composite: “Hope” by Toni Harryman
·         Portrait: “Let Me Dream” by Mari Latozas
·         Wedding: “Wish” by Ricky Pan
·         Wildlife/Landscape: “Great Blue Heron in the Mist” by Becky Kempf

Stay tuned to the LexJet blog and Sunset and LexJet social media for updates on future Sunset Image Award competitions.

title: IntoPrint RF8510 Digital Label Finisher

The Next Evolution in Digital Label Finishing 

All-In-One Solution Laminates, Die Cuts, Strips, Slits, Rewinds

The computer-driven cutting technology is also capable of cutting multiple depths within the same cut file, allowing for perforations or multi-layer applications.

title: HP Recycled Satin Canvas
description:
The affordable HP Recycled Satin Canvas provides single-step print production, eliminating the need for costly and time-consuming top coating. Meet environmental goals with this REACH compliant canvas made with yarn from 100% recycled water bottles. Recycling beverage containers (and other materials) saves energy, reduces greenhouse gas emissions, and diverts material from landfills.

HP Recycled Satin Canvas is REACH compliant and eligible for return through the HP large Format Media take-back program.* In addition to this environmental assurance, HP Recycled Satin Canvas produces outstanding image quality and durable canvas wraps that resist edge cracking.

This innovative canvas is priced lower than most similar canvases in the market and provides a one-step solution for print service providers by eliminating the need for a costly and time-consuming protective coating. Compatible with aqueous inks, HP Recycled Satin Canvas has a slightly textured, satin-finish that produces an artistic look and feel for photo enlargements, reproductions and retail, corporate and hospitality décor.

HP Recycled Satin Canvas was awarded the 2018 SGIA Product of the Year by the Specialty Graphic Imaging Association— one of the print industry’s most prestigious awards.

title: LexJet Reviews - Best Floor Graphics Products - Textured Indoor Floor and Wall Vinyl
description:
Textured Indoor Floor & Wall Vinyl is a matte, semi-rigid calendared vinyl with a pressure-sensitive adhesive that is specially formulated with a high-tack removable adhesive backed by a 135gsm lay-flat liner.

This special combination of vinyl and adhesive allows the removability of this product from normal wall surfaces. Designed for floor graphics, wall murals, decals and graphics, LexJet Textured Indoor Floor & Wall Vinyl sticks to most flat, semi-gloss, and gloss painted surfaces. The 135gsm tight-release liner provides excellent stability when printed with latex, solvent and UV curable inks.

The material has an R10B slip-certification for safe use on floor graphics.

For more information  or to order LexJet Textured Indoor Floor & Wall Vinyl,  visit https://www.lexjet.com/lexjet-6-mil-t... or call a LexJet sales specialist at 800-453-9538.

title: How-to Use Auto Serialization in HP Flexi Sign & Print for Variable Data
description:
The SAi Flexi software included with the HP Latex Print and Cut Solution makes creating decals with variable data fast and simple. 

This video will show you how to use the Auto-serialization feature within Flexi to automatically add unique numbers to your image.

Without a tool like Auto-serialization, you’d be forced to do this manually which is both time consuming and problematic.
